ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was recorded */,
  "air_temp" REAL /* Air temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "barometric_press" REAL /* Barometric pressure in hPa */,
  "dew_point" REAL /* Dew point temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "relative_humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity in percentage */,
  "wind_dir" REAL /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "wind_gust" REAL /* Wind gust speed in m/s */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Average wind speed in m/s */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the station_id in the stations table */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather monitoring station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather monitoring station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather monitoring station above sea level */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the source_id in the data_sources table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the station above sea level */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the station's location */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of weather monitoring station */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Organization or individual responsible for the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the raw weather data entry */,
  "validity" TEXT /* Validity status of the data */,
  "anomaly_detected" INTEGER /* Indicates if an anomaly was detected in the data */,
  "quality_metrics" TEXT /* Additional metrics to assess the quality of the weather data */,
  "data_validation_status" TEXT /* Status of the data validation process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the external data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source provider */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data provided by the source */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the data source is updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* Information about the user's browser or application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the weather event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "event_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the weather event */,
  "affected_areas" TEXT /* Areas affected by the weather event */,
  "event_category" TEXT /* Category of the weather event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "meta_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry this metadata relates to */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the data was collected */,
  "record_count" INTEGER /* Total number of records for this dataset */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metadata was last updated */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the weather data */,
  "data_licence" TEXT /* Licence under which the data is released */,
  "data_provenance" TEXT /* Information about the origin and history of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meta_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)
